void.string: *

*
*
<%@ page language="java" contentType="text/html; charset=UTF-8" pageEncoding="UTF-8"%> <%@ include file="/resource/jsp/common.jsp"%> <%@ page import="com.landray.kmss.web.taglib.xform.TagUtils" %>

<model > <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3352b86a668998" label="填报人" type="String" length="200" formula="true" defaultValue="$docCreator$" /> <extendElementProperty name="fd_3c7c6150f16006" label="申请部门1" type="com.landray.kmss.sys.organization.model.SysOrgElement" notNull="true" defaultValue="OrgFunction.getCurrentDept()" formula="true" dialogJS="Dialog_Address(!{mulSelect}, '!{idField}','!{nameField}', ';',ORG_TYPE_ORG|ORG_TYPE_DEPT);" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3c8056fc5c667c" label="申请单位" type="String" length="200" defaultValue="上海电气核电设备有限公司" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3d5dee8fdd3264" label="主题1" type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3d5deead2894ac" label="内容简要" type="String" length="600" notNull="true" /> </model>
*
<%@ page language="java" contentType="text/html; charset=UTF-8" pageEncoding="UTF-8"%> <%@ include file="/resource/jsp/common.jsp"%> <%@ page import="com.landray.kmss.web.taglib.xform.TagUtils" %>

<model > <extendElementProperty name="fd_3d5df07476e8b4" label="填报人" type="com.landray.kmss.sys.organization.model.SysOrgPerson" defaultValue="OrgFunction.getCurrentUser()" formula="true" dialogJS="Dialog_Address(!{mulSelect}, '!{idField}','!{nameField}', ';',ORG_TYPE_PERSON);" /> <extendElementProperty name="fd_3c7c6150f16006" label="申请部门1" type="com.landray.kmss.sys.organization.model.SysOrgElement" notNull="true" defaultValue="OrgFunction.getCurrentDept()" formula="true" dialogJS="Dialog_Address(!{mulSelect}, '!{idField}','!{nameField}', ';',ORG_TYPE_ORG|ORG_TYPE_DEPT);" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3c8056fc5c667c" label="申请单位" type="String" length="200" defaultValue="上海电气核电设备有限公司" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3d5deead2894ac" label="内容简要" type="String" length="600" notNull="true" /> </model>
*
<%@ page language="java" contentType="text/html; charset=UTF-8" pageEncoding="UTF-8"%> <%@ include file="/resource/jsp/common.jsp"%> <%@ page import="com.landray.kmss.web.taglib.xform.TagUtils" %>

<model > <extendElementProperty name="fd_3d5df07476e8b4" label="填报人" type="com.landray.kmss.sys.organization.model.SysOrgPerson" defaultValue="OrgFunction.getCurrentUser()" formula="true" dialogJS="Dialog_Address(!{mulSelect}, '!{idField}','!{nameField}', ';',ORG_TYPE_PERSON);" /> <extendElementProperty name="fd_3c7c6150f16006" label="申请部门1" type="com.landray.kmss.sys.organization.model.SysOrgElement" notNull="true" defaultValue="OrgFunction.getCurrentDept()" formula="true" dialogJS="Dialog_Address(!{mulSelect}, '!{idField}','!{nameField}', ';',ORG_TYPE_ORG|ORG_TYPE_DEPT);" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3c8056fc5c667c" label="申请单位" type="String" length="200" defaultValue="上海电气核电设备有限公司" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3d60f36636cb4c" label="发起的公司新闻流程状态" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3d5deead2894ac" label="内容简要" type="String" length="600" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3d60f460ea3006" label="内容简要1" type="String" length="" /> </model>

*
 
  *
  *
  *
*
*
*

<%@ page language="java" contentType="text/html; charset=UTF-8" pageEncoding="UTF-8"%> <%@ include file="/resource/jsp/common.jsp"%> <%@ page import="com.landray.kmss.web.taglib.xform.TagUtils" %>
公司领导 总师总监 部门正职 部门副职 一般员工 公出
是 否 是 否
有项目 无项目
<%-- 基准行 --%> <%-- 内容行 --%>
' title='添加行' onclick='DocList_AddRow();XFom_RestValidationElements();'>
{1}
<%-- 明细表行ID --%>
' title=删除行 onclick='DocList_DeleteRow_ClearLast();XFom_RestValidationElements();'>  ' title=上移 onclick='DocList_MoveRow(-1);'>  ' title=下移 onclick='DocList_MoveRow(1);'>
${vstatus.index + 1}
<%-- 明细表行ID --%>
' title=删除行 onclick='DocList_DeleteRow_ClearLast();XFom_RestValidationElements();'>  ' title=上移 onclick='DocList_MoveRow(-1);'>  ' title=下移 onclick='DocList_MoveRow(1);'>

<model > <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3352b86a668998" label="出差人员" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3352b870a0cb06" label="项目令号" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3c8056fc5c667c" label="申请单位" type="String" length="200" defaultValue="上海电气核电设备有限公司" /> <extendElementProperty name="fd_3c7c6150f16006" label="申请部门1" type="com.landray.kmss.sys.organization.model.SysOrgElement" notNull="true" defaultValue="OrgFunction.getCurrentDept()" formula="true" dialogJS="Dialog_Address(!{mulSelect}, '!{idField}','!{nameField}', ';',ORG_TYPE_ORG|ORG_TYPE_DEPT);" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3c7fdd7efd33d0" label="职务类别" notNull="true" enumValues="公司领导|公司领导;总师总监|总师总监;部门正职|部门正职;部门副职|部门副职;一般员工|一般员工" type="String" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3c7fdda2838a6a" label="请假类别" enumValues="公出|公出" type="String" defaultValue="公出" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3a49d91779e03c" label="是否有同部门同行人员" notNull="true" enumValues="是|1;否|0" type="String" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3a49d938042836" label="人数是否超过2人" notNull="true" enumValues="是|1;否|0" type="String" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3352baf003e1da" label="是否有项目" notNull="true" enumValues="有项目|1;无项目|2" type="String" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3352b873433ea0" label="出差省市与地区" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3352b8720b5d80" label="联系电话" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_days" label="出差天数1" type="Double" length="10" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_begin_date" label="出差开始日期" type="Date" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3c7fdf24ddfed8" label="出差开始日期-文本" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_end_date" label="请假结束日期" type="Date" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3c7fdf360261c0" label="出差结束日期-文本" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSubTableProperty name="fd_3352b8ade18210" label="明细表1" > <idProperty><generator type="assigned" /></idProperty> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3352ba02d82766" label="出差行程计划" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3352ba0a4995e6" label="事由" type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> </extendSubTableProperty>
</model>

*
*
<%@ page language="java" contentType="text/html; charset=UTF-8" pageEncoding="UTF-8"%> <%@ include file="/resource/jsp/common.jsp"%> <%@ page import="com.landray.kmss.web.taglib.xform.TagUtils" %>

<model > <extendElementProperty name="fd_3d5df07476e8b4" label="填报人" type="com.landray.kmss.sys.organization.model.SysOrgPerson" defaultValue="OrgFunction.getCurrentUser()" formula="true" dialogJS="Dialog_Address(!{mulSelect}, '!{idField}','!{nameField}', ';',ORG_TYPE_PERSON);" /> <extendElementProperty name="fd_3c7c6150f16006" label="申请部门1" type="com.landray.kmss.sys.organization.model.SysOrgElement" notNull="true" defaultValue="OrgFunction.getCurrentDept()" formula="true" dialogJS="Dialog_Address(!{mulSelect}, '!{idField}','!{nameField}', ';',ORG_TYPE_ORG|ORG_TYPE_DEPT);" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3c8056fc5c667c" label="申请单位" type="String" length="200" defaultValue="上海电气核电设备有限公司" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3d5dee8fdd3264" label="主题1" type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3d5deead2894ac" label="内容简要" type="String" length="600" notNull="true" /> </model>
<%@ page language="java" contentType="text/html; charset=UTF-8" pageEncoding="UTF-8"%> <%@ include file="/resource/jsp/common.jsp"%> <%@ page import="com.landray.kmss.web.taglib.xform.TagUtils" %>

<model > <extendElementProperty name="fd_3d5df07476e8b4" label="填报人" type="com.landray.kmss.sys.organization.model.SysOrgPerson" defaultValue="OrgFunction.getCurrentUser()" formula="true" dialogJS="Dialog_Address(!{mulSelect}, '!{idField}','!{nameField}', ';',ORG_TYPE_PERSON);" /> <extendElementProperty name="fd_3c7c6150f16006" label="申请部门1" type="com.landray.kmss.sys.organization.model.SysOrgElement" notNull="true" defaultValue="OrgFunction.getCurrentDept()" formula="true" dialogJS="Dialog_Address(!{mulSelect}, '!{idField}','!{nameField}', ';',ORG_TYPE_ORG|ORG_TYPE_DEPT);" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3c8056fc5c667c" label="申请单位" type="String" length="200" defaultValue="上海电气核电设备有限公司" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3d60f36636cb4c" label="发起的公司新闻流程状态" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3d5deead2894ac" label="内容简要" type="String" length="600" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3d60f460ea3006" label="内容简要1" type="String" length="" /> </model>
